welcome.title: Welcome to your space
welcome.lede: Valmont Seragone Mato will guide you. A single point of contact, reachable any time from your space. Reply within 30 working minutes, standard NDA activated.

auth.ledeModal: You have an invitation code, or an account already.
auth.lede: You already have access. Sign in with your email and password, or activate your invitation code for a first connection.
auth.modeFirstHint: You received an invitation code by email. Activate it and choose your password.
auth.modeReturningHint: You already have an account. Direct sign-in to your space.
auth.codeInvalid: Invalid invitation code. Check the characters you entered.
auth.passwordTooShort: The password must be at least 8 characters.
auth.passwordMismatch: The two passwords do not match.
auth.forgotLede: Enter your email address. If an account is linked to it, you'll receive a link to choose a new password.
auth.forgotSent: If an account is linked to this address, a reset link has just been sent. Please check your inbox.
auth.confirmEmailSent: Your account is created. Confirm your address via the email we just sent, then sign in.

resetPassword.title: Choose a new password
resetPassword.success: Password updated. You are signed in.
resetPassword.noSession: Link expired or invalid. Please request a new one from "Forgot password".

account.dashboardLede: A curated selection prepared for you, your active inquiries, and direct access to your concierge.

profile.editLede: Your information stays strictly between you and Valmont. No shared database, no newsletter.

intent.heading: What can I find for you today?

travel.title: I'd like to travel
travel.drawerLede: Describe the destination, dates, number of travellers and any constraints — Valmont composes the itinerary.
travel.placeholder: E.g. Maldives in November, 4 people, 10 days, jet included, hotel on private atoll.

object.title: I'm looking for a specific object
object.hint: Horology, artwork, collector car — describe the piece.
object.drawerTitle: I'm looking for a specific object
object.drawerLede: Be specific — reference, acceptable years, expected condition, papers, possible price range. Valmont activates the network.
object.placeholder: E.g. Patek Philippe Nautilus 5711/1A blue dial, 2018-2022, full set, good condition minimum.

event.title: I want to organise an event
event.hint: Wedding, jubilee, private dinner, seminar — from brief to last toast.
event.drawerTitle: I want to organise an event
event.drawerLede: Tell us the nature, approximate date, guest count, venue if already chosen.
event.placeholder: E.g. Wedding 220 guests at Lake Como, summer 2027, Villa del Balbianello preferred.

jet.title: I need a private jet
jet.hint: Short or long-haul, 6h notice is enough.

preferences.contactConcierge: To update any of these details, contact your concierge.
preferences.notifEmailHint: Receive acknowledgements and updates by email.
preferences.notifPhoneHint: Your concierge can reach you directly by phone.
preferences.recommendationsHint: Selection tailored to your interests on the dashboard.

events.title: Private events
events.lede: Galas, openings, private dinners, sport — access kept off-market.

properties.title: Properties
properties.lede: Selected residences across Switzerland and Europe, on request.

timepieces.title: Timepieces
timepieces.lede: Collector horology, full set with documented provenance.

artworks.title: Artworks
artworks.lede: Unique pieces by contemporary artists, certificates of authenticity included.

journeys.title: Journeys
journeys.lede: Bespoke itineraries — private jet, yacht, guided expeditions.

concierge.title: Concierge
concierge.lede: Bespoke service capabilities — transport, gastronomy, security, medical, cultural.

catalogue.title: The catalogue
catalogue.lede: Every opportunity curated by your concierge, at a glance.

preparing.title: Your selection is being prepared
preparing.body: Your concierge is composing your personal space and will notify you as soon as it is available. Any request can already be sent.

wizard.openHint: Tell us what you're looking for — we'll handle the rest.
wizard.title: What can I find for you?

category.lede: Choose the area of your request.

details.lede: Describe your need — brand, model, dates, constraints, approximate budget. The more precise, the faster we move.
details.photoHint: Helpful for a watch, an artwork, a specific object.
details.allOptional: All fields are optional. Leave blank what you don't know yet — Valmont will get back to clarify.

extras.lede: Add photos and any details that help us understand better.

other.lede: No catalogue covers everything. Tell us what you need — even one-off — our concierge knows unusual cases and will find a way.
other.placeholder: Whatever you need — private access, rare object search, specific arrangement, medical urgency — just tell us.

callback.hint: No form — he gets back to you within 24h.

review.title: Everything is ready
review.lede: Your concierge will get back to you within 24 hours.

admin.dashboardLede: Active inquiries, invitation codes, recent signups.

invitations.title: Invitations
invitations.mockBanner: Demo mode — Supabase not configured. Actions are local only.
invitations.emptyAll: No code generated yet. Mint the first one below.

inquiries.title: Inquiries
inquiries.lede: Inquiries sent by members from their private space. Drag the status forward as you triage.

users.title: Users
users.lede: Account management — members and operators. Promote or demote inline by clicking the action on each row.
users.confirmPromote: Promote {{name}} to operator? This person will gain admin access.
users.confirmDemote: Demote {{name}} to member? Admin access will be revoked.
users.cannotChangeSelf: You cannot change your own role.
users.segmentsModalLede: Tick the segments this member belongs to. They decide which fiches the member can see.
users.noSegmentsAvailable: No segment exists yet. Create one in the Segments tab.

drawer.confirmSuspend: Suspend {{name}}'s access? They will no longer be able to sign in (reversible).
drawer.suspendedNotice: This member is suspended: they cannot sign in until you reactivate them.
drawer.confirmDelete: Permanently delete {{name}}'s account? All their data will be erased. This cannot be undone.

segments.title: Segments
segments.lede: Group members by category (e.g. clients referred by a bank). Each fiche can then be restricted to one or more segments.
segments.slugHint: lowercase, digits and dashes — e.g. piguet-galland
segments.descriptionPlaceholder: Optional — internal note about this segment.
segments.confirmDelete: Delete segment “{{label}}”? Tagged members will lose it, and fiches restricted to it will become visible again per their other rules.
segments.empty: No segments yet. Create the first one above.
segments.slugInvalid: The identifier must be lowercase letters, digits and dashes (2 to 40 characters).

activity.title: Recent activity
activity.empty: No activity yet. The feed lights up as soon as visitors interact with the site.
activity.invitationRedeemedSub: A new member just signed up via this code.

accessRequests.title: Access requests
accessRequests.lede: Anonymous visitors who filled the landing "Request access" form. Triage: new → contacted → accepted/declined.
accessRequests.confirmAccept: Accept this request? A single-use access code will be generated and emailed to the requester.
accessRequests.confirmDelete: Permanently delete {{name}}'s request? This cannot be undone.

sanityNotice.title: Sanity Studio not configured
sanityNotice.body: To add or edit news, products and events, set VITE_SANITY_PROJECT_ID in Netlify and redeploy. Once wired, these links open the external Studio.

catalogue.title: Catalogue
catalogue.lede: Add, edit or remove items, events, journeys, services and articles. Every change appears in the member space instantly.
catalogue.ledeStudio: Catalogue overview. Creation and editing happen in Sanity Studio — click "Create in Sanity" to open the editor.
catalogue.fallbackNotice: Sanity not configured — limited view. Set VITE_SANITY_PROJECT_ID in Netlify and redeploy to enable editing.

audience.title: Audience — {{title}}
audience.lede: Choose who can see this fiche in the member space. Enforcement is guaranteed server-side.
audience.loadError: Could not load the audience rules.
audience.modeAllHint: Visible to any signed-in member (except the exclusions below).
audience.modeSegmentsHint: Visible only to members tagged with at least one ticked segment.
audience.noSegments: No segment exists yet. Create one in the Segments tab.
audience.exclusionsHint: These members will never see the fiche, whatever their segment.

admin.confirmDelete: Confirm deletion — this is permanent (lot B: localStorage reset restores).
admin.empty: No item for this module. Click + Add to create the first one.

toasts.created: Item created. Visible in the member space now.

inquiry.drawerLede: Your concierge gets back to you within 24 hours.
inquiry.messagePlaceholder: Mention any constraints, dates or questions.
inquiry.success: Request transmitted. Valmont will reach out within 24 hours.
inquiry.error: Sending failed. Try again in a moment or message Valmont directly.

jet.drawerLede: Tell us departure, arrival and passengers — Valmont confirms availability within 30 minutes.
jet.notesPlaceholder: Pets, special equipment, meals, diplomatic constraints…
jet.success: Flight request transmitted. Valmont confirms within 30 minutes.
jet.error: Sending failed. Try again in a moment or call Valmont.
jet.focalReassurance: Valmont (your concierge) receives this request directly and confirms within 30 working minutes. At any time, you can call from the button bottom-right.

dock.title: Your concierge
dock.availability: Available 7 days a week, 6 a.m. – 11 p.m. Europe/Zurich
dock.writeLede: Write freely — Valmont reads each message personally and replies within 24 hours.

samples.property: This property came off a private collection last week. The family lived there twenty years — the history is intact. Three clients are in parallel conversation alongside this listing — call me before visiting, I'll tell you where we stand.
samples.timepiece: The set is complete, seals intact. I verified the papers this morning with the authorised dealer. The piece will not go to auction — it's a private cession, owner to owner. If you're interested, I'll put you in direct contact.
samples.artwork: I knew this piece at Galerie Standard in Oslo in 2024. The gallery entrusted us with it exclusively before it returns to collection. The smoked-oak frame is included. I can organise a studio visit with the artist if you really want to feel the material.
samples.journey: This is an itinerary we composed for two families this summer. The French-speaking ranger we privatise across 8 days makes all the difference — no sharing with another group. On these dates, we know the Mombo suite is available. I can block it for 48 hours.

schedule.title: Book 30 minutes with Valmont
schedule.lede: Pick a slot in the next 7 days. You receive the confirmation and iCal invitation within 30 minutes.
schedule.timezone: Europe/Zurich hours. If nothing fits, write to Valmont — he adapts.
schedule.notesHint: Helps Valmont prepare the conversation. A few words is enough.
schedule.notesPlaceholder: E.g. review wishlist + question about the July stay.
schedule.calendarHint: Once confirmed, the iCal invitation arrives by email. One-click add to Google Calendar / Outlook.
schedule.success: Request sent. Valmont confirms {{day}} at {{slot}} within 30 minutes.
schedule.error: Sending failed. Try again in a moment or message Valmont.

saved.title: My collection
saved.lede: The pieces you've pinned. Valmont sees your collection and can anticipate.
saved.emptyLede: Tap heart on any piece you're drawn to — it'll appear here. Valmont reads the list and proposes accordingly.

search.label: Search your space
search.placeholder: Search a watch, a property, an event…
search.empty: No result. Rephrase or describe your need to Valmont.

seo.title: Presentation
seo.description: Swiss private circle — curated access to the exceptional, a bespoke platform and absolute discretion.

hero.title: Access to the exceptional,
hero.lede: A Swiss house that opens, for a chosen clientele, the doors that stay closed. Rare goods, private experiences, invisible logistics.

offer.heading: Ten domains, one standard
offer.lede: From exceptional assets to confidential experiences, every request is handled with the same rigour.

quality.heading: Discretion as a method
quality.item1Body: A dedicated lead coordinates every party, from the first request to delivery.
quality.item2Body: Contractual confidentiality, no display. What is private stays private.
quality.item3Body: Partners selected and proven, in Switzerland and internationally.
quality.item4Body: No standard offer. Each case is built around a precise need.

platform.heading: A private member area
platform.body: Beyond concierge, members access a private area presenting bespoke offers, reserved and renewed regularly.
platform.point1Body: Goods and experiences offered to members only, off the public market.
platform.point2Body: Express a need; it is qualified and handled by a lead within 24 hours.
platform.point3Body: Entry is by referral or reviewed request. The circle stays small.

form.heading: Tell us what you are looking for
form.lede: Describe your need. A dedicated lead will contact you discreetly.
form.name: Name
form.messagePlaceholder: What you are looking for, by when, for whom.
form.consent: I agree to be contacted about my request.
form.success: Request received. A dedicated lead will contact you shortly.
form.error: Sending failed. Please try again or write to us directly.

cta.heading: Join the circle
cta.body: Become a member to access the private area, or explore the house.

qrpage.title: Scan to discover
qrpage.hint: Point your phone camera at the code to open the presentation.

experience.heading: Everything becomes an experience
experience.body: Wealth management, security, acquiring a rare asset — every service is lived as an experience.

bespoke.title: Describe what you're after — we'll handle it
bespoke.lede: Valmont and his network open the right doors. The more specific you are (reference, range, dates), the faster the answer arrives.
bespoke.descriptionHint: Be as specific as possible — reference, brand, era, dimensions, constraints.
bespoke.descriptionPlaceholder: E.g. Patek Philippe Aquanaut 5167A steel black dial, 2018-2022, full set, papers required, range 60-75K CHF.
bespoke.budgetHint: Optional but recommended — speeds up network triage.
bespoke.attachHint: Reference visuals, screenshots, existing certificates, plans. Up to 5 files.
bespoke.confidentialHint: Your request is handled by Valmont only. Standard NDA activated, no indexing, no resale.
bespoke.success: Bespoke request sent. Valmont will reach out within 24 hours.
bespoke.error: Sending failed. Try again in a moment or message Valmont.

generic.title: Not finding what you're looking for?
generic.lede: Describe it. Valmont activates his network — rare watches, off-market properties, event access, custom-composed journeys.

property.title: Your ideal property isn't here?
property.lede: A specific neighbourhood, a particular layout, a precise view? Our off-market network covers all of Europe.

timepiece.title: The reference you want isn't listed?
timepiece.lede: Tell us the brand, reference, year, expected condition. Valmont activates partner dealers and collectors.

artwork.title: The piece isn't in the catalogue?
artwork.lede: Artist, era, medium, range — we activate the galleries and auction houses we work with.

event.title: Interested in a specific event?
event.lede: Closed gala, opening night, private concert — describe it, we check seats and negotiate access.

journey.title: Your dream trip isn't listed?
journey.lede: Destination, duration, level of accompaniment, constraints — Valmont composes the itinerary end to end.

concierge.title: Need a service that isn't here?
concierge.lede: Describe it — security, medical, event logistics. We activate the appropriate partner team.

trust.modalLede: Sawnext Studio is a Swiss private circle. Every request, every transaction, every exchange follows the protocol below — no exception.
trust.footerNote: For specific legal questions, your lawyer or notary is invited to contact our compliance department directly — Valmont will introduce them.

nda.title: Standard NDA on every request
nda.body: Every request from your space automatically triggers a confidentiality agreement signed by both parties. No third party has access.

encryption.title: End-to-end encrypted communications
encryption.body: Outgoing emails encrypted via Resend, data stored at Supabase Frankfurt with at-rest encryption. Passwords Argon2id-hashed.

residency.title: Data residency — European Union
residency.body: Personal data hosted in Germany (Supabase EU-Central-1, Frankfurt). No extra-EU transfer without standard contractual clauses.

vetted.title: Vetted circle — by-invitation access only
vetted.body: Catalogue access requires a single-use invitation code handed in person. No public sign-up flow, no unverified referrals.

escrow.title: Escrow available for sensitive transactions
escrow.body: For major acquisitions (horology, real estate, art), our partner notary in Geneva can escrow funds until effective transfer.

compliance.title: GDPR + Swiss DPA compliant
compliance.body: Your access, rectification, erasure and portability rights are operational within 7 days. Data Protection Officer reachable directly.

audit.title: Audit log available on request
audit.body: Every view, request and profile modification is logged. You can export your full audit log at any time via Valmont.

status.expired: This code is no longer valid.
status.notFound: No item is associated with this code. The code may be wrong, or the item has been withdrawn.
status.invalidFormatBody: The expected code is 6 characters, with no prefix or space. Check your entry or contact Valmont.
status.expiredBody: This code has reached its expiry date or maximum number of views. Valmont can generate a new one.
status.revokedBody: Valmont has revoked this code. No access is possible with this link.

public.intro: A by-invitation selection for a vetted clientele. Without noise, without excess.

cp6.before: What you will not find in

hero.metaFieldText: Private services, confidential projects, off-market access. A single point of contact. No agency, no platform.

presentation.lead: Independent by structure. Discreet by discipline. Selective by necessity.
presentation.p1: SAW↗NEXT supports private clients and entrepreneurs on projects, opportunities and experiences that fall outside the standard frame.
presentation.p2: The network spans sport, watchmaking, finance, real estate and art. It was built through cooptation, not outreach.
presentation.paragraph1: SAW↗NEXT supports private clients and entrepreneurs on projects, opportunities and experiences that fall outside the standard frame. The network spans sport, watchmaking, finance, real estate and art. It was built through cooptation, not outreach.
presentation.paragraph2: Our role rests on three verbs: identify, structure, facilitate. We do not replace any expert. We open doors that others do not see. What comes through us never leaves through any other channel. No client case. No name. No anecdote.
presentation.paragraph3: No sales pitch. No demo. A conversation, a qualification, then — if the project sits within our scope — a written engagement. The pace is that of the case, not of a platform. Every collaboration starts with a frame: scope, deliverables, checkpoints, duration. No grey areas.

identify.title: Identify
identify.desc: Read the brief, isolate the real need, distinguish the request from the symptom. Five questions, never more.

structure.title: Structure
structure.desc: Frame the scope, select the useful partners, write the plan. Everything is recorded, everything is dated.

facilitate.title: Facilitate
facilitate.desc: Lift obstacles silently, all the way to delivery. Discretion is a deliverable like any other.

p1.body: is not an argument. It is built over time, through actions, and verified when things get difficult. We do not ask for it. We work to deserve it.

p2.body: is not optional. No name, no anecdote, no client case will leave this house. Our references speak through cooptation, or not at all.

p3.prefix: And beyond projects, what matters most are
p3.body: . A single interlocutor. No platform, no chain where everyone passes responsibility.

principles.footer: What we do not compromise on.

code.label: Invitation code
code.helper: Format SAW-XXXX-XXXX, issued directly by Valmont.
code.legal: The code is personal and single-use. It requires no prior information.

interlocutor.bio: Every exchange begins with a conversation. One interlocutor, from first contact to delivery.

valmont.bio: Over the years, Valmont Seragone Mato has built a solid international network across luxury, watchmaking, private events, aviation and bespoke services, with an approach grounded in discretion, trust and the quality of human relationships. Your direct interlocutor, from first conversation to the delivery of each project.

harvy.bio: Active for many years in professional sport and demanding international environments, Harvy O'Rollin has developed a solid network across sport, events and premium lifestyle. Involved in various entrepreneurial and matchmaking ventures, he today supports a private and professional clientele with a human, discreet and opportunity-driven approach.

lucian.bio: Present for many years in the worlds of nightlife, entertainment and international showbiz, Lucian Trial has built over time a solid network and a relationship of trust with various personalities and their entourage. Accustomed to high-stakes environments and the handling of sensitive requests, he today operates across personalised support, coordination of specific needs and connection-making.

tavio.bio: Active for several years across real estate, architecture and project development, Tavio Modic has a versatile vision combining aesthetic sense, ground-level approach and an overall understanding of the different stages of design and execution. Drawn to projects with strong identity and high-end environments, he brings a transversal approach attentive to detail and to human connections.

sergio.bio: Active for many years in international environments linked to top-level sport and its ecosystem, Sergio Kubas has built a solid network within private circles and a demanding international clientele. Active in matchmaking, advisory and the development of opportunities, he operates with a discreet approach oriented toward high-value connections.
